title: Explore: Architecture
description: Map current workflow state, roadmap phase scope, and source-registry boundaries.
findings: No application code exists yet. Phase 1 should create source registry layout, schema, seed files, validator, and documentation while preserving catalog-first constraints.

title: Explore: Patterns
description: Find existing similar implementations and local conventions.
findings: Specs require catalog-first IA, official-source priority, DP out-of-level handling, and evidence/review status for classification tags. Existing repo has workflow docs only.

title: Explore: Tests
description: Map test infrastructure and verification conventions.
findings: No test framework exists. Use a dependency-free Node validation script first, exposed via package.json script, then add formal tests after application scaffold exists.

title: Generate Plan
description: Consume explorations and produce plan.json + TASK files.
findings: Generated Phase 1 plan with 7 tasks across scaffold, schema, official/secondary seeds, validator, docs, and verification.
